summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SMIFS Discovery Module (autodiscovery feature). Backend: 16/17 tests passed (94.1%). Frontend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). The discovery module is fully functional with SNMP scanning, job management, device import, topology visualization, and Netdisco integration.

minor_bugs.issue: General search query 'q=auto' does not match devices with 'auto-discovered' tag. However, using 'tags=auto-discovered' parameter works correctly.
minor_bugs.impact: Minor - devices are correctly tagged, just the search parameter doesn't match tags
minor_bugs.workaround: Use 'tags=auto-discovered' instead of 'q=auto' to filter by tag

working_endpoints: POST /api/discovery/scan - ad-hoc scan with simulated results
GET /api/discovery/jobs/{id} - job status with completion tracking
POST /api/discovery/netdisco/test - graceful failure with bogus URL
POST /api/discovery/netdisco/sync - graceful failure with bogus URL
GET /api/discovery/netdisco/settings - returns settings with masked password

passed_tests: Backend: Login with admin/admin credentials
Backend: GET /api/discovery/stats returns all required counters
Backend: POST /api/discovery/credentials creates credential with v2c/public
Backend: GET /api/discovery/credentials lists credentials
Backend: DELETE /api/discovery/credentials removes credential
Backend: POST /api/discovery/scan returns simulated device with interfaces/IPs/neighbors
Backend: POST /api/discovery/jobs creates job with auto_import=true
Backend: POST /api/discovery/jobs/{id}/run queues job
Backend: Job completes within 4 seconds with scanned>=1, discovered>=1, imported>=1
Backend: GET /api/discovery/devices returns discovered devices
Backend: POST /api/discovery/devices/{id}/import creates SMIFS device
Backend: GET /api/discovery/topology returns nodes and edges
Backend: POST /api/discovery/netdisco/test with bogus URL returns reachable=false (graceful)
Backend: POST /api/discovery/netdisco/sync with bogus URL returns devices_pulled=0 (graceful)
Backend: GET /api/discovery/netdisco/settings returns settings dict
Backend: POST /api/discovery/netdisco/settings saves settings
Backend: Auth enforcement - 401 without token
Frontend: Login successful with admin/admin
Frontend: Main dashboard shows dark-green Autodiscovery promo card
Frontend: Sidebar shows Discovery group with all 6 sub-items (Dashboard, Credentials, Discovery Jobs, Discovered Devices, Network Topology, Netdisco Sync)
Frontend: /discovery dashboard shows 6 stat cards, Ad-hoc Scan section, Quick Links
Frontend: Ad-hoc scan with 10.10.10.10 returns simulated result with Import button
Frontend: Ad-hoc scan Import button creates device (toast appears)
Frontend: /discovery/credentials page - Add Credential dialog opens
Frontend: /discovery/jobs page - Add Job dialog opens
Frontend: /discovery/devices page lists 11 discovered devices
Frontend: /discovery/topology shows canvas and Links panel
Frontend: /discovery/netdisco shows all controls (Base URL, Username, Password, Test/Save/Pull buttons)
Frontend: Netdisco Test Connection with bogus URL returns unreachable (graceful, no 500 error)
action_item_for_main_agent: One minor backend issue: The general search parameter 'q=auto' does not match devices with 'auto-discovered' tag. The devices are correctly tagged (verified by direct query), but the search endpoint doesn't search within tags. Consider updating the /api/devices endpoint to include tag matching in the 'q' parameter, or update the requirement to use 'tags=auto-discovered' parameter instead. This is a LOW priority issue as the workaround is simple and all core functionality works perfectly.
